Around us

Cap d'Agde and the Hérault region are full of natural and cultural treasures.

Nearby

  • 🏖️ Beach 15 min on foot or 5 min by bike
  • ⛵ Cap d'Agde port with many restaurants
  • ⛳ Golf, tennis, adventure park
  • 🚴 Cycling paths all around
  • 🛒 All shops close by
  • 🥖 Traditional market on Saturday mornings

The region

Sète

Charming island city, birthplace of Georges Brassens

Pézenas

Medieval old town, art galleries, market

Portiragnes-Plage

Family seaside village with a natural beach

Étang de Thau

Oyster and mussel tasting, kayaking

Lac du Salagou

Red lake among vineyards, swimming and hiking

Cirque de Mourèze

Spectacular dolomite rock formations

St-Guilhem-le-Désert

One of France's most beautiful villages, Hérault gorges

Montpellier

Vibrant city, 45 min by car

Béziers

Canal du Midi, bullring, Languedoc lifestyle

Narbonne

Roman city, cathedral, covered market

Links and practical information to be added by the owner.

Étoile de la Mer

Cap d'Agde, 34300 Agde
